scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @covas-labs/electron-vr && npm run build --workspace @covas-labs/electron-vr-demo
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && npm run start --workspace @covas-labs/electron-vr-demo
scripts.start:no-sandbox: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && npm run start:no-sandbox --workspace @covas-labs/electron-vr-demo
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e:runtime-info && npm run test:e2e:smoke && npm run test:e2e
